nationalNumbers.name: All-in-One Emergency (ERSS)
nationalNumbers.description: Pan-India single emergency number for police, fire, and medical emergencies.

nationalNumbers.name: Ambulance
nationalNumbers.description: Free emergency ambulance service (available in most states).

nationalNumbers.name: Women Helpline (Domestic Abuse)
nationalNumbers.description: Women helpline for domestic abuse and distress.

nationalNumbers.name: Child Helpline
nationalNumbers.description: 24x7 helpline for children in need of care and protection.

nationalNumbers.name: Cyber Crime
nationalNumbers.description: National helpline to report cyber crime and online fraud.

nationalNumbers.name: National Highway Emergency
nationalNumbers.description: 24x7 helpline for accidents, breakdowns, and emergencies on National Highways.

nationalNumbers.name: Senior Citizen Helpline
nationalNumbers.description: Helpline for elderly assistance and support.

nationalNumbers.name: Tele-MANAS Mental Health
nationalNumbers.description: 24x7 national mental health support and counselling helpline.
